name: aegisFlow
description: 一个基于多智能体协作的命令行工具，将你的原始想法自动推进为完整 PRD、技术设计、评审记录，并调度本地开发工具链完成交付。A multi-agent collaborative CLI tool that automatically transforms your raw ideas into complete PRDs, technical designs, review records, and orchestrates local development toolchains to deliver the final product.
